properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Long before the earth Before there was light Lord You were Endless are You God No time can contain all you are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's no other God before You There is no other one to replace you You are forevermore And there's no other God I call to You are the One I cling to You are forevermore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Faithful are You God You never change Lord You are Only You are God Forever You reign above it all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's no other God before You There is no other one to replace You You are forevermore And there's no other God I call to You are the One I cling to You are forevermore

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's no other No on Greater There is none like You There's no other No on Geater There is none like You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's no other God before You There is no other one to replace you You are forevermore And there's no other god I call to You are the one I cling to You are forevermore
